captures.notes: Canonical Codrops article for attribution and technical framing; local evidence below is generated from scratch for learning review.
Local generated rebuild screenshot showing synthetic depth map, scan reveal plane, near/mid/far dot grid, and generated-depth source label; not copied from the Codrops demo.
Local generated motion clip isolates the scan plane sweeping across a synthetic depth-dot field; not copied from the Codrops demo.
Standalone local HTML/SVG exercise reconstructing the primitive with generated depth dots, scan plane animation, legend, and source-boundary labels.
Manifest lists only generated local learning evidence plus source-link attribution boundaries.

payload.rebuild_scope: local generated depth-dot study from the visible primitive, not a capture of upstream imagery or shader code
payload.scan_model: vertical reveal plane sweeps across a synthetic depth map and brightens points by depth class

modules.review_notes: Complete for first-pass learning: still image, motion clip, and code note all represent the same scan-depth primitive.

payload.background_system: dark technical grid plus bounded scan rectangle
payload.shader_proxy: depth value controls dot size, brightness, and revealed state
payload.source_boundary: does not claim Codrops TSL nodes, exact WebGPU pipeline, or source imagery

modules.review_notes: Material notes are complete for visual reconstruction; exact WebGPU shader implementation is intentionally not claimed.

payload.rights_boundary: canonical source is link-only; archived assets are generated locally

modules.review_notes: Asset pipeline is complete because generated inputs, outputs, rights boundary, and verification command are explicit.

payload.evidence_layer: local PNG proves scan midpoint, local GIF proves sweep motion, HTML note proves the rebuild recipe
payload.review_gap: canonical source remains link-only; local rebuild teaches mechanics without upstream media
payload.route_decision: use scan progress to reveal which evidence zones are inspected, near/mid/far dots to encode confidence or depth of review
payload.source_trail: canonical article plus generated local reconstruction
payload.uncertainty: exact upstream WebGPU/TSL implementation and source imagery are not claimed

modules.review_notes: VULCA mapping is complete because source, evidence, review gap, route decision, and uncertainty are all represented.

summary: Depth-map scanning reference rebuilt as a local scan-depth learning primitive with still, motion, code, and asset evidence.
title: WebGPU Scanning Effect with Depth Maps
why_relevant: Directly maps to VULCA review-gap inspection, scan-plane reveal, confidence depth, and technical evidence probing primitives.
